name: teamkb-capture
description: Optional passive capture for teamkb — distills durable team facts from each Claude Code session and saves them to your team brain. Recall/save still work without this (the brain is added as an MCP connector by URL); this just nudges capture on the CLI surface.

brain_mcp_url.title: Brain MCP URL
brain_mcp_url.description: Your full teamkb connector URL including your name, e.g. https://my-brain.sprites.app/mcp/<secret>/<your-name>/ . The URL IS the credential — treat it like a password.
